final_answer:
I must inform you that there is a logical contradiction in the constraints provided for this email. You specified that the email must contain between 150 and 200 words, yet also require at least 300 words. It is mathematically impossible for a single document to satisfy both conditions simultaneously. One constraint inherently negates the other; a text cannot exceed 200 words if it must stay under that threshold, nor can it reach 300 words if it is capped at 200.

To help you properly, could you please clarify which word count requirement is the priority? I can easily draft a short extension request within 150-200 words if you prefer conciseness, or a more detailed explanation requiring 300+ words if you wish to elaborate on your reasons. I will ensure the final draft matches your confirmed preference exactly. This will avoid generating text that fails to meet the actual intended length for your submission.

Thank you for understanding this limitation.

Please confirm which direction you would like to proceed so I can assist you immediately.<|im_end|>
